diagram_title: Reclaim Orphan Assistant Rows And Surface Unexpected Rebind Resets

activities.title: Detect Orphan Assistant Row
activities.description: On persistUserMessage entry, scan most-recent message in the session via MessageV2.stream; classify as orphan if role==='assistant' AND time.completed===undefined AND (Date.now() - time.created) >= ORPHAN_RECLAIM_MIN_AGE_MS (5000ms)

activities.title: Finalize Orphan Assistant Row
activities.description: Set finish='error', time.completed=Date.now(), error={ name:'NamedError.Unknown', data:{ message:'abandoned_orphan_round' } }; persist via Session.updateMessage so StorageRouter, Bus.publish, and usage-delta accounting all run normally

activities.title: Emit Reclaim Runtime Event
activities.description: RuntimeEventService.append({ domain:'workflow', eventType:'session.orphan_assistant_reclaimed', payload:{ sessionID, reclaimedMessageID, ageMs, providerId, modelId, accountId } })

activities.title: Detect Unexpected Epoch Reset
activities.description: In RebindEpoch.bumpEpoch, predicate (trigger==='daemon_start' AND everBumped.has(sid) AND previousEpoch===0) identifies registry eviction; emits anomaly event session.rebind_epoch_unexpected_reset; bump behaviour itself unchanged

activities.title: Maintain everBumped Process Set
activities.description: Module-level Set<sessionID> populated on every successful bump; cleared by RebindEpoch.reset() (test) and clearSession (session.deleted bus); the durable signal that survives in-memory registry eviction
